status: BalDay VWAP $84 sold off from $90 open to $79 on solar. Buying the evening ramp option at $80. 42 GW outages + 114 GW load + M3 gas at $3.03.

thesis: Buying Apr on risk of stronger cash. March cash has printed $55-90+ on outage season volatility — Apr inherits elevated outages + renewables as primary drivers (per Edi: April rarely weather dependent all outages and renewables). If cash stays firm through late March the Apr strip re-rates higher. Current cold front breaking but outage season persists.
status: Apr trading $55 while March cash has been volatile $40-100+. Outage season peaks Mar-Apr. Graceton ends Friday but Conastone + Brunswick outages persist into April. Calvert back helps but 28+ GW planned outages = structural floor for pricing. M3 gas at $3+ raises marginal cost floor vs Feb levels ($2.27-2.58).

status: Order did not fill — ask was $46 and DA cleared below. Logging at $45 intent.

pnl: DA cleared $41.40. Would have made $3.60/MWh. Order didn't fill but thesis was correct — Saturday soft as expected.

thesis: Outages came in at 77k MW today. Clouds + low solar making south load sticky — textbook cloudy-shoulder bullish regime (no BTM offset, load hangs flat through midday). Context: was greedy with weak cash earlier in the week and missed setups. Pulled the trigger today.
notes: 50 MW. First actual trade since 3/26. Regime-consistent entry per weather_vs_load framework finalized today.

thesis: Took the $0.75 win and sized out — not greedy, consistent with lesson from earlier in the week.
